Features

Everything You Need to Succeed

Powerful features designed to make managing money effortless and intelligent

Smart Budgeting

AI-powered budget tracking with real-time alerts and spending insights to keep you on track.

Learn more

AI Assistant

Chat with OpenRouter (GPT-4o Mini) for personalized financial advice and instant answers to your money questions.

Learn more

Investment Tracking

Monitor your portfolio performance and get smart investment recommendations based on your goals.

Learn more

Bank-Level Security

Your data is encrypted and protected with enterprise-grade security protocols.

Learn more

Smart Analytics

Understand your spending patterns with AI-driven insights and predictive forecasting.

Learn more

Expert Mentors

Connect with certified financial advisors for personalized guidance and professional advice.

Learn more

Simple Process

How It Works

Get started in minutes and take control of your financial future

01
01

Sign Up Free

Create your account in seconds. No credit card required to start your journey.

02
02

Connect Accounts

Securely link your bank accounts and credit cards for automatic transaction tracking.

03
03

AI Analyzes

Our AI analyzes your spending patterns and provides personalized insights instantly.

04
04

Achieve Goals

Track your progress, get alerts, and reach your financial goals faster than ever.

Start your journey in less than 2 minutes
